use_cases: Create interactive buttons that reveal video or image content on hover for engaging user experiences
Build media galleries with hover-activated video/image previews
Design animated CTA buttons with multimedia backgrounds
Add visual interest to navigation elements with media reveal effects
Create interactive landing page components with dynamic media content
ai_summary: A minimalist dark-styled button component that reveals video or image media content on hover using Framer Motion animations. Supports both .mp4/.webm video and image formats with smooth opacity transitions and an optional dark overlay for text readability.
